_comment: Whole-career party-line loyalty. careerPct = percent of votes cast with the majority of the member's own party, across their whole time in office. Read each member's per-Congress loyalty from the VoteView table linked in 'source', then put the career average in careerPct (a number, e.g. 92.4). Set it once; historical loyalty does not change. When careerPct is a number, the app fills that member's loyalty bar automatically.
